sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n33615" key="e)leuqeroprasi/ou" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐλευθερο-πρᾱσίου</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">δίκη, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen></foreign>, prosecution <sense id="n33615.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">for selling a freeman as a slave</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:3:78" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.78</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
